codeReview.summary: The implementation correctly integrates the TipTap editor with the required extensions and implements robust mapping logic to the DocumentContentSchema. The EditorContent component handles all required block insertions, and the unit tests are comprehensive, including coverage for deeply nested structures like tabs > callout > code_block.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker had to use a scripted Playwright approach for manual UI verification because interactive browser tooling was unavailable. The worker explicitly suggested updating the skill to include this Playwright fallback note for environments without interactive browsers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: In the handoff file, skillFeedback.suggestedChanges explicitly requests adding a fallback note recommending scripted Playwright verification. The transcript also shows the worker executing Playwright scripts against the Storybook instance.

summary: Implementation fully meets requirements. TipTap is properly configured, custom extensions are present, the JSON mapper is thoroughly unit-tested, and Storybook integration is successful.
